seedPool.name: Fire
seedPool.description: Raw, untamed flame.
seedPool.narrative: The first gift. Stolen from lightning, feared by beasts, worshipped by the wise.

seedPool.name: Stone
seedPool.description: Hard, cold, and ancient.
seedPool.narrative: The bones of the earth, exposed. The first tools were shaped from stone.

seedPool.name: Water
seedPool.description: The source of all life.
seedPool.narrative: Before anything grew, water was there. It carves canyons and cradles civilizations.

seedPool.name: Beast
seedPool.description: A wild creature, wary and powerful.
seedPool.narrative: Before domestication, every animal was a threat or a meal.

seedPool.name: Wood
seedPool.description: A fallen branch, dry and sturdy.
seedPool.narrative: The first handle, the first lever, the first fuel.

seedPool.name: Seed
seedPool.description: A tiny promise of future abundance.
seedPool.narrative: Inside every seed is a forest waiting to happen.

seedPool.name: Bone
seedPool.description: The frame of what once lived.
seedPool.narrative: Harder than wood, sharper when broken. Bone was the first recycled material.

seedPool.name: Clay
seedPool.description: Wet earth that holds any shape.
seedPool.narrative: From clay came pots, tablets, and bricks.

seedPool.name: Vine
seedPool.description: Flexible green rope from the forest.
seedPool.narrative: Before cord, before rope, vines bound the first tools together.

seedPool.name: Hide
seedPool.description: Tough animal skin, scraped and dried.
seedPool.narrative: The first clothing, the first shelter wall.

seedPool.name: Flint
seedPool.description: Glassy stone that fractures into blades.
seedPool.narrative: Strike it right and flint gives you fire. Strike it wrong and it gives you a knife.

seedPool.name: Berry
seedPool.description: Small, bright fruit from the undergrowth.
seedPool.narrative: The first food that didn't fight back.

seedPool.name: Mud
seedPool.description: Wet earth that swallows footprints.
seedPool.narrative: The first building material. Civilization began when someone shaped mud with intent.

seedPool.name: River
seedPool.description: Flowing water carving paths through land.
seedPool.narrative: Every great settlement began beside a river.

seedPool.name: Cave
seedPool.description: A dark hollow in the rock face.
seedPool.narrative: The first home. Walls of stone kept out wind, rain, and teeth.

seedPool.name: Sun
seedPool.description: The burning eye that governs all seasons.
seedPool.narrative: Worshipped, feared, and depended upon.

conditions.description: Make a ⭐⭐⭐ Item
Create a tool or weapon
Develop agriculture or animal husbandry
Build a shelter or permanent dwelling
Create clothing or protection from the elements
Discover a method of food preservation or cooking

seedPool.name: Copper
seedPool.description: Soft metal, easy to shape.
seedPool.narrative: The first metal humans mastered.

seedPool.name: Grain
seedPool.description: Golden stalks from cultivated fields.
seedPool.narrative: When humans stopped chasing food and started growing it, history began.

seedPool.name: Clay
seedPool.description: Malleable earth waiting for purpose.
seedPool.narrative: From clay came pots, tablets, and bricks.

seedPool.name: Ox
seedPool.description: Domesticated power on four legs.
seedPool.narrative: Once predator and prey, now partners.

seedPool.name: River
seedPool.description: Flowing water carving paths.
seedPool.narrative: Every great city began beside a river.

seedPool.name: Sun
seedPool.description: The burning eye above.
seedPool.narrative: The sun decides when crops grow.

seedPool.name: Tin
seedPool.description: A rare, silvery metal.
seedPool.narrative: Useless alone, but mixed with copper it creates bronze.

seedPool.name: Kiln
seedPool.description: Controlled heat for shaping materials.
seedPool.narrative: Fire tamed and directed.

seedPool.name: Wheel
seedPool.description: A circle that conquers friction.
seedPool.narrative: The wheel moved everything forward.

seedPool.name: Loom
seedPool.description: A frame for weaving thread into cloth.
seedPool.narrative: The loom turned fiber into fabric.

seedPool.name: Brick
seedPool.description: Fired clay, stacked into permanence.
seedPool.narrative: Brick by brick, villages became cities.

seedPool.name: Reed
seedPool.description: Tall grass from the riverbank.
seedPool.narrative: Woven into baskets, pressed into paper, bundled into boats.

conditions.description: Make a ⭐⭐⭐ Item
Create a system of writing or record-keeping
Develop organized trade or commerce
Create an alloy or advance metalworking
Build a city, temple, or monument
Establish irrigation or large-scale farming
Create pottery, textiles, or a craft tradition

seedPool.name: Iron
seedPool.description: Dark metal forged in hotter flames.
seedPool.narrative: Iron democratized warfare and farming alike.

seedPool.name: Script
seedPool.description: Marks on surfaces that outlast memory.
seedPool.narrative: What is written persists beyond the writer.

seedPool.name: Horse
seedPool.description: Speed and power, tamed.
seedPool.narrative: Empires rose on horseback.

seedPool.name: Harbor
seedPool.description: Where land meets sea and trade begins.
seedPool.narrative: A harbor is a door between worlds.

seedPool.name: Temple
seedPool.description: Stone raised in devotion.
seedPool.narrative: Temples organized people around shared belief.

seedPool.name: Field
seedPool.description: Tended earth yielding surplus.
seedPool.narrative: Surplus created time. Time created thinkers.

seedPool.name: Coin
seedPool.description: Stamped metal representing value.
seedPool.narrative: Before coins, trade was barter. After coins, trade was empire.

seedPool.name: Plow
seedPool.description: Iron blade that tears open earth.
seedPool.narrative: The plow turned forests into farmland.

seedPool.name: Forge
seedPool.description: A furnace hot enough to shape iron.
seedPool.narrative: The forge is where raw ore becomes sword, nail, and future.

seedPool.name: Oath
seedPool.description: A spoken bond between people.
seedPool.narrative: Before written law, oaths held societies together.

seedPool.name: Wall
seedPool.description: Stone stacked to keep the world out.
seedPool.narrative: Walls define who is inside and who is outside.

seedPool.name: Sail
seedPool.description: Cloth that catches wind for travel.
seedPool.narrative: The sail turned oceans into bridges.

conditions.description: Make a ⭐⭐⭐ Item
Develop philosophy, logic, or abstract thought
Build a military force or defensive fortification
Establish a currency or economic system
Create a legal code or system of justice
Build a navy or establish sea routes

seedPool.name: Senate
seedPool.description: An assembly where citizens govern.
seedPool.narrative: Democracy began in a room full of arguments.

seedPool.name: Legion
seedPool.description: Disciplined soldiers marching as one.
seedPool.narrative: The legion conquered through logistics.

seedPool.name: Marble
seedPool.description: White stone carved into beauty.
seedPool.narrative: Marble made the invisible visible.

seedPool.name: Scroll
seedPool.description: Rolled knowledge, portable and shareable.
seedPool.narrative: Libraries became the true seats of power.

seedPool.name: Aqueduct
seedPool.description: Engineered water flowing uphill.
seedPool.narrative: Romans made water flow where nature said it shouldn't.

seedPool.name: Forum
seedPool.description: A public square for debate and trade.
seedPool.narrative: Where citizens argued and philosophers annoyed everyone.

seedPool.name: Amphora
seedPool.description: Clay vessel for wine, oil, and trade.
seedPool.narrative: The shipping container of the ancient world.

seedPool.name: Road
seedPool.description: Paved stone connecting distant cities.
seedPool.narrative: All roads lead somewhere. The lasting ones were built by empires.

seedPool.name: Olive
seedPool.description: Oil, food, and a symbol of peace.
seedPool.narrative: Planting an olive tree is an act of faith in the future.

seedPool.name: Theater
seedPool.description: A stage for stories that shape culture.
seedPool.narrative: Tragedy taught a city to weep together.

seedPool.name: Compass
seedPool.description: A needle that always finds north.
seedPool.narrative: The compass made coming home possible.

seedPool.name: Algebra
seedPool.description: Abstract symbols solving real problems.
seedPool.narrative: When humans learned to think in variables, the universe became solvable.

conditions.description: Make a ⭐⭐⭐⭐ Item
Establish a system of law, governance, or democracy
Create great works of art, architecture, or literature
Build large-scale infrastructure like roads or aqueducts
Advance mathematics, astronomy, or natural philosophy
Establish a system of education or a great library

seedPool.name: Castle
seedPool.description: Fortified stone seat of power.
seedPool.narrative: A castle is both home and weapon.

seedPool.name: Faith
seedPool.description: Belief that moves mountains and armies.
seedPool.narrative: Faith built cathedrals and launched crusades.

seedPool.name: Parchment
seedPool.description: Animal skin prepared for writing.
seedPool.narrative: Monks copied the world's knowledge, one page at a time.

seedPool.name: Mill
seedPool.description: Water or wind grinding grain.
seedPool.narrative: The mill freed hands and fed cities.

seedPool.name: Guild
seedPool.description: Craftsmen organized for mutual benefit.
seedPool.narrative: The first professional networks.

seedPool.name: Knight
seedPool.description: Armored warrior bound by a code.
seedPool.narrative: Part soldier, part ideal.

seedPool.name: Plague
seedPool.description: Disease that reshapes civilizations.
seedPool.narrative: The plague killed millions and freed the survivors.

seedPool.name: Market
seedPool.description: A gathering place for buying and selling.
seedPool.narrative: Markets built the middle class.

seedPool.name: Monastery
seedPool.description: A quiet place dedicated to learning.
seedPool.narrative: While kingdoms burned, monasteries preserved.

seedPool.name: Crown
seedPool.description: Symbol of royal authority.
seedPool.narrative: The crown is just metal. The power is the story everyone agrees to believe.

seedPool.name: Bow
seedPool.description: Bent wood that launches death at range.
seedPool.narrative: The bow made every peasant a threat.

seedPool.name: Spice
seedPool.description: Precious flavor from distant lands.
seedPool.narrative: Wars were fought over spice.

conditions.description: Make a ⭐⭐⭐⭐ Item
Advance craftsmanship or establish a guild or trade network
Build a fortification, castle, or walled city
Establish a religious or educational institution
Develop feudal governance or a system of allegiance
Create a mechanical innovation like a mill, clock, or press
Survive or overcome a crisis like famine, plague, or invasion

seedPool.name: Canvas
seedPool.description: A blank surface waiting for vision.
seedPool.narrative: The canvas freed art from walls.

seedPool.name: Lens
seedPool.description: Curved glass that bends light.
seedPool.narrative: The lens revealed both the impossibly small and the impossibly far.

seedPool.name: Press
seedPool.description: A machine that copies words at scale.
seedPool.narrative: The printing press spread revolution, science, and doubt.

seedPool.name: Bank
seedPool.description: An institution that lends and stores wealth.
seedPool.narrative: Banks turned gold into credit and credit into ambition.

seedPool.name: Anatomy
seedPool.description: The study of the human body.
seedPool.narrative: Artists and doctors found the same truth inside.

seedPool.name: Globe
seedPool.description: A model of the whole world.
seedPool.narrative: The globe shrank the earth to something you could hold.

seedPool.name: Ink
seedPool.description: Dark fluid that carries ideas.
seedPool.narrative: Ink made thought permanent and portable.

seedPool.name: Compass
seedPool.description: A needle that always finds north.
seedPool.narrative: The compass made leaving home imaginable.

seedPool.name: Patron
seedPool.description: A wealthy supporter of arts and ideas.
seedPool.narrative: The Medici didn't paint — they made painting possible.

seedPool.name: Gunpowder
seedPool.description: Explosive powder that changed warfare.
seedPool.narrative: Castle walls meant nothing once gunpowder arrived.

seedPool.name: Ship
seedPool.description: A vessel built for ocean crossings.
seedPool.narrative: Ships connected continents.

seedPool.name: University
seedPool.description: An institution dedicated to knowledge.
seedPool.narrative: Universities gave thinkers permission to disagree.

conditions.description: Make a ⭐⭐⭐⭐ Item
Make a breakthrough in science, art, or medicine
Enable the spread of knowledge or ideas at scale
Establish a financial institution or banking system
Create a masterwork of visual art, music, or literature
Advance navigation, cartography, or exploration capability

seedPool.name: Caravel
seedPool.description: A fast ship built for discovery.
seedPool.narrative: The caravel shrank the world.

seedPool.name: Map
seedPool.description: The known world drawn on paper.
seedPool.narrative: Every blank space on the map was an invitation.

seedPool.name: Spice
seedPool.description: Precious flavor worth its weight in gold.
seedPool.narrative: The spice trade built and destroyed empires.

seedPool.name: Colony
seedPool.description: A settlement in a distant land.
seedPool.narrative: Colonies exported resources and imported conflict.

seedPool.name: Cannon
seedPool.description: Heavy artillery that breaks walls.
seedPool.narrative: Cannons on ships turned merchants into conquerors.

seedPool.name: Telescope
seedPool.description: A tube that brings the distant near.
seedPool.narrative: The telescope showed new lands and new worlds.

seedPool.name: Tobacco
seedPool.description: A new world plant with old world demand.
seedPool.narrative: A leaf that shaped history.

seedPool.name: Gold
seedPool.description: The metal that drives men across oceans.
seedPool.narrative: Gold promised freedom and delivered slavery.

seedPool.name: Compass
seedPool.description: A needle pointing toward the unknown.
seedPool.narrative: The compass said 'this way.' Courage said 'why not?'

seedPool.name: Treaty
seedPool.description: A written agreement between powers.
seedPool.narrative: Treaties drew lines on maps and divided worlds.

seedPool.name: Plantation
seedPool.description: Large-scale farming in conquered lands.
seedPool.narrative: Sugar was sweetened with suffering.

seedPool.name: Astrolabe
seedPool.description: An instrument for reading the stars.
seedPool.narrative: The astrolabe turned the night sky into a navigation chart.

conditions.description: Make a ⭐⭐⭐⭐ Item
Discover or connect with a new land or civilization
Establish a global trade route or network
Build a colonial settlement or overseas outpost
Create a new form of diplomacy or international agreement
Develop advanced navigation or shipbuilding
Exchange crops, animals, or ideas between distant cultures

seedPool.name: Steam
seedPool.description: Pressurized vapor that moves machines.
seedPool.narrative: The industrial revolution ran on boiling water.

seedPool.name: Coal
seedPool.description: Black rock that burns hot and long.
seedPool.narrative: Coal powered the factories and blackened the skies.

seedPool.name: Rail
seedPool.description: Iron tracks connecting cities.
seedPool.narrative: Railroads collapsed distance.

seedPool.name: Factory
seedPool.description: A building where goods are mass-produced.
seedPool.narrative: Factories turned craftsmen into workers.

seedPool.name: Cotton
seedPool.description: Soft fiber spun into thread and cloth.
seedPool.narrative: Cotton mills were the first factories.

seedPool.name: Patent
seedPool.description: Legal protection for an invention.
seedPool.narrative: Patents turned ideas into property.

seedPool.name: Telegraph
seedPool.description: Electrical signals across wires.
seedPool.narrative: The first time a message traveled faster than a person.

seedPool.name: Union
seedPool.description: Workers organized for their rights.
seedPool.narrative: Unions gave workers a voice factories couldn't ignore.

seedPool.name: Dynamite
seedPool.description: Controlled explosion for construction.
seedPool.narrative: Its inventor funded the Peace Prize.

seedPool.name: Newspaper
seedPool.description: Daily printed news for the masses.
seedPool.narrative: Newspapers created public opinion.

seedPool.name: Rubber
seedPool.description: Elastic material from tropical trees.
seedPool.narrative: Tires, gaskets, and erasers — all from tree sap.

seedPool.name: Steel
seedPool.description: Iron refined to extraordinary strength.
seedPool.narrative: Steel built the skyscrapers and bridges of the modern skyline.

conditions.description: Make a ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ Item
Mechanize production or transform how goods are made
Connect distant regions through transportation or communication
Organize labor or establish workers' rights
Harness a new energy source for industry
Build critical infrastructure like bridges, tunnels, or networks
Create a mass-market consumer product or service

seedPool.name: Electricity
seedPool.description: Invisible force that powers everything.
seedPool.narrative: The modern world runs on lightning in wires.

seedPool.name: Automobile
seedPool.description: A machine that moves people by engine.
seedPool.narrative: The car rebuilt cities and paved the world.

seedPool.name: Radio
seedPool.description: Sound broadcast through invisible waves.
seedPool.narrative: Radio put a voice in every home.

seedPool.name: Vaccine
seedPool.description: Medicine that prevents disease.
seedPool.narrative: Humanity's greatest collective achievement.

seedPool.name: Film
seedPool.description: Moving pictures that tell stories.
seedPool.narrative: Film showed humanity its own face.

seedPool.name: Petroleum
seedPool.description: Black liquid that powers the modern world.
seedPool.narrative: The 20th century ran on petroleum and regret.

seedPool.name: Concrete
seedPool.description: Liquid stone that hardens into anything.
seedPool.narrative: More used than any material except water.

seedPool.name: Atom
seedPool.description: The smallest unit, containing enormous energy.
seedPool.narrative: Splitting the atom gave humanity godlike power.

seedPool.name: Plastic
seedPool.description: Synthetic material shaped into anything.
seedPool.narrative: Convenience with a thousand-year hangover.

seedPool.name: Ballot
seedPool.description: A vote cast in private.
seedPool.narrative: Change through counting instead of fighting.

seedPool.name: Antibiotic
seedPool.description: Medicine that kills bacteria.
seedPool.narrative: A mold that saved millions.

seedPool.name: Skyscraper
seedPool.description: A building that scrapes the sky.
seedPool.narrative: The skyline became humanity's signature.

conditions.description: Make a ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ Item
Harness a new form of energy or revolutionize medicine
Create mass media or reshape how people communicate
Achieve powered flight or high-speed transportation
Split the atom or unlock a fundamental force of nature
Establish international cooperation or a global institution
Build a megastructure or transform the urban landscape
Wage or survive a world war and forge lasting peace from its aftermath

seedPool.name: Computer
seedPool.description: A machine that thinks in numbers.
seedPool.narrative: Computers became extensions of the human mind.

seedPool.name: Internet
seedPool.description: A network connecting every screen.
seedPool.narrative: The internet made distance irrelevant for information.

seedPool.name: Chip
seedPool.description: A sliver of silicon running billions of calculations.
seedPool.narrative: More computing power in your pocket than in moon rockets.

seedPool.name: Satellite
seedPool.description: A machine orbiting Earth.
seedPool.narrative: Satellites watch the weather and guide your car.

seedPool.name: Database
seedPool.description: Organized information at scale.
seedPool.narrative: Databases remember everything.

seedPool.name: Algorithm
seedPool.description: A set of instructions that solves problems.
seedPool.narrative: Algorithms run the invisible infrastructure of modern life.

seedPool.name: Fiber
seedPool.description: Glass threads carrying light as data.
seedPool.narrative: The backbone of the connected world.

seedPool.name: Genome
seedPool.description: The complete code of a living thing.
seedPool.narrative: Reading the genome gave humanity the source code of life.

seedPool.name: Solar Cell
seedPool.description: A panel that turns sunlight into power.
seedPool.narrative: The sun has always been the answer.

seedPool.name: Drone
seedPool.description: An unmanned flying machine.
seedPool.narrative: The same technology, different intentions.

seedPool.name: Blockchain
seedPool.description: A ledger that no one controls.
seedPool.narrative: Blockchain replaced trust in institutions with trust in mathematics.

seedPool.name: AI Model
seedPool.description: Software that learns from patterns.
seedPool.narrative: AI thinks like nothing that has ever existed before.

conditions.description: Make a ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ Item
Create artificial intelligence or autonomous systems
Connect all of humanity through a global network or platform
Decode or manipulate the building blocks of life
Transition to renewable or sustainable energy
Create a virtual world, digital economy, or online society
Replace human physical labour in manufacturing, logistics, or agriculture through robotics
Put a networked supercomputer in the hands of every person on Earth

seedPool.name: Rocket
seedPool.description: Controlled explosion aimed at the sky.
seedPool.narrative: Every launch says 'we refuse to stay.'

seedPool.name: Orbit
seedPool.description: The path of endless falling.
seedPool.narrative: Falling sideways fast enough to miss the ground.

seedPool.name: Habitat
seedPool.description: A bubble of Earth in the void.
seedPool.narrative: Every breath is engineered, every drop recycled.

seedPool.name: Fusion
seedPool.description: Starfire harnessed by human hands.
seedPool.narrative: Humanity no longer depends on its own planet for energy.

seedPool.name: Rover
seedPool.description: A robot explorer on alien soil.
seedPool.narrative: Humanity's fingers, touching worlds our feet can't reach yet.

seedPool.name: Telescope
seedPool.description: An eye that sees across the universe.
seedPool.narrative: Space telescopes see the past — light from billions of years ago.

seedPool.name: Asteroid
seedPool.description: A rock containing a fortune in metals.
seedPool.narrative: Mining them could make scarcity obsolete.

seedPool.name: Station
seedPool.description: A permanent outpost in orbit.
seedPool.narrative: The first step to never needing Earth.

seedPool.name: Quantum
seedPool.description: Computing with the fabric of reality.
seedPool.narrative: Quantum computers solve problems classical machines can't describe.

seedPool.name: Mars
seedPool.description: The red planet, waiting.
seedPool.narrative: Close enough to reach and hostile enough to test everything.

seedPool.name: Cryogenics
seedPool.description: Preservation through extreme cold.
seedPool.narrative: Can we pause life and resume it later?

seedPool.name: Signal
seedPool.description: A message sent into the cosmos.
seedPool.narrative: Someone, somewhere, might be listening.

conditions.description: Make a ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ Item
Establish a permanent human presence beyond Earth
Solve a fundamental challenge facing humanity's future
Achieve human life extension or indefinite biological preservation
Make first contact or detect extraterrestrial life
Terraform or colonize another planet
Achieve a post-scarcity economy or unlimited clean energy
Launch a self-sustaining interstellar probe or generation ship
